seo.title: Building Customer Support with DSPy + Vex Guardrails
seo.description: Learn how to build customer support with DSPy + Vex guardrails. Detect failures, prevent drift, and ensure reliability.

content.intro: DSPy enables programming LLMs for customer support agents through composable, optimizable modules rather than manual prompting. Customer support use cases demand high reliability due to real-world consequences like incorrect order lookups or policy violations. Vex guardrails wrap DSPy module forward() calls to catch failures like overfitting prompts and assertion violations before they reach customers.

architectureOverview.heading: Customer Support Architecture with DSPy
architectureOverview.description:
The DSPy customer support agent follows a RAG pattern with CRM integration. User queries trigger a DSPy ChainOfThought module for intent classification, followed by a retrieval module querying a knowledge base and CRM APIs. Tool-calling modules handle order lookups and ticket creation, with a final response generation module ensuring tone consistency.

Key DSPy signatures include classify_intent(), retrieve_context(), call_tools(), and generate_response(). Optimization compiles these modules against training data from support interactions. The pipeline processes queries sequentially: intent вҶ’ retrieval вҶ’ tools вҶ’ response.

Vex verification wraps each module's forward() call, checking response accuracy, PII filtering, tone, policy compliance, and escalation triggers before outputs propagate.

risks.name: Overfitted Intent Classification
risks.description: DSPy optimization overfits to training examples, misclassifying edge-case customer queries
risks.mitigation: Vex verifies classification confidence and fallback routing

risks.name: Hallucinated CRM Data
risks.description: Chain-of-thought reasoning fabricates plausible but incorrect order details from CRM
risks.mitigation: Vex cross-validates tool outputs against CRM API responses

risks.name: Unfiltered PII Exposure
risks.description: Response generation leaks customer phone numbers, emails, or account numbers
risks.mitigation: Vex scans all outputs with regex and NER for PII before delivery

risks.name: Tone Inconsistency
risks.description: Module composition creates sarcastic or overly casual responses violating brand voice
risks.mitigation: Vex sentiment analysis ensures professional, empathetic tone

implementation.title: DSPy Intent Classification Module
implementation.description: Basic DSPy signature for classifying customer support intents with CoT reasoning

implementation.title: RAG Context Retrieval
implementation.description: DSPy module retrieving relevant KB articles and CRM context for the query

implementation.title: Tool Calling for Order Lookup
implementation.description: DSPy signature calling CRM APIs for order status and ticket creation

implementation.title: Final Response Generation
implementation.description: Generate customer-facing response with proper tone and escalation logic

vexIntegration.title: Wrap Intent Classification with Vex
vexIntegration.description: Verify intent classification catches overfitting and confidence issues

vexIntegration.title: PII Filtering on Tool Outputs
vexIntegration.description: Protect customer data in CRM responses with comprehensive PII detection

vexIntegration.title: Tone + Policy + Escalation Verification
vexIntegration.description: Comprehensive final verification ensuring brand compliance and escalation logic

cta.heading: Secure Your DSPy Customer Support
cta.description: Install Vex today with `pip install vex-sdk` and wrap your DSPy modules to eliminate support failures.
